html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Gobbler

The Lucky Fan can be acquired in exchange for 3 Lucky Gold Nuggets at the Gobbler Shrine.

When used the first three times, it loses 22.2% durability per use. It summons a whirlwind that destroys nearby Structures, causing damage to nearby Mobs and also to the player. This is similar to but not the same as the function of the Weather Pain. The fan also cools players down and puts out nearby Fires similar to the Luxury Fan.

When used the last three times, it loses 11.1% durability per use and does not create whirlwinds anymore.

Gallery

  • Lucky Fan Using Models.
  • WX-78 using a Lucky Fan.

“It's inordinately large.”
–Wilson
“It's a big ol' fan.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang feel very lucky!”
–Wolfgang

–Wendy
“CIRCUIT COOLING SYSTEM”
–WX-78
“It's quite lovely.”
–Wickerbottom
“It had to be birds, didn't it?”
–Woodie
“Now I'll have no problem keeping my cool.”
–Maxwell
“Tis a fan för mine hand.”
–Wigfrid
“It's so big!!”
–Webber
“Would anyone like me to cool them down?”
–Warly
“Makes wind”
–Wormwood
“It's a big fan made of tailfeathers.”
–Winona
“A gust of luck from feathers plucked!”
–Wortox
“Feather stick!”
–Wurt
“Hey Woby, it's our biggest fan! Heh... good one, Walter.”
–Walter
“I don't think it was very lucky for the poor bird.”
–Wanda
The Lucky Fan can be acquired in exchange for 3 Lucky Gold Nuggets at the Gobbler Shrine.
When used the first three times, it loses 22.2% durability per use. It summons a whirlwind that destroys nearby Structures, causing damage to nearby Mobs and also to the player. This is similar to but not the same as the function of the Weather Pain. The fan also cools players down and puts out nearby Fires similar to the Luxury Fan.
When used the last three times, it loses 11.1% durability per use and does not create whirlwinds anymore.

Chiếc Quạt May Mắn có thể được mua bằng cách đổi lấy 3 Thỏi Vàng May Mắn tại Đền Gobbler.

The '''Lucky Fan''' can be acquired in exchange for 3 Lucky Gold Nuggets at the Gobbler Shrine.

When used the first three times, it loses 22.2% durability per use. It summons a whirlwind that destroys nearby [[Structures]], causing damage to nearby [[Mobs]] and also to the player. This is similar to but not the same as the function of the [[Weather Pain]]. The fan also cools players down and puts out nearby [[Fire]]s similar to the [[Luxury Fan]].

When used the last three times, it loses 11.1% durability per use and does not create whirlwinds anymore.
